items.title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
items.summary: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".

items.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
items.summary: The retired couple tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course in the English Channel before the shots were fired.

items.summary: Eduardo Bolsonaro called the conviction "baseless and senseless".

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 俄控烏無人機擊中巴士 白俄兒童足球隊遭殃
items.summary: 俄羅斯地方當局17日表示，1架烏克蘭無人機在位於俄國西部、與烏克蘭接壤的布揚斯克州（Bryansk）擊中1輛巴士，造成1死6傷，車上當時載有1支來自白俄羅斯的兒童足球隊。  ...…
